reviews.comment:
Pasamos el domingo 27/2/22 cerca de las 13 hs prontas a nuevo destino, y la atención del Sr. Playero quien no solo nos cargo combustible, sino q le enseño a mi amiga a limpiar los vidrios jajaja (el cual él termino claro xq somos un desastre y limpio ntras luces tbn) y nos sugirio lugares para almorzar un domingo. Un genio, super agradecidas

(Translated by Google)
We stopped by on Sunday, February 27th, 2022, around 1 PM, ready for our next destination. The attendant was incredibly helpful; he not only filled our tanks but also showed my friend how to clean the windshields (which he finished, of course, because we're terrible at it, and he cleaned our headlights too). He even suggested some great places to have lunch on a Sunday. He was a gem! We're so grateful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18090789075875574973/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQycjdITEh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención aunque un poco lenta pero creo que es el ritmo de allá y uno lo nota porque llega de Buenos Aires. Recomendable porque el combustible es de buena calidad.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, although a bit slow, but I think that's the pace there, and you notice it coming from Buenos Aires. Recommended because the fuel is good quality.
